bottlenecks.solution: Take advantage of 3X Stunt Race Series before it expires.
bottlenecks.detail: Expires Jul 13 (8 days left). 3X bonus active — prioritize this over normal activities.

bottlenecks.label: ⚡ 2X Bunker Sell Missions THIS WEEK

bottlenecks.label: 💊 Not selling to Street Dealers
bottlenecks.solution: Visit 3 Street Dealers daily (~15 min for ~$202-250K). Requires MC businesses + Acid Lab stocked.
bottlenecks.detail: Street Dealers refresh daily at 07:00 UTC. Sell Cocaine, Meth, Weed & Acid for ~$250K/day average with premiums. Best $/minute ratio in the game.

bottlenecks.label: No Car Wash (passive income)
bottlenecks.solution: Purchase Car Wash ($1.5M) + feeders for up to ~$23K/hr passive income
bottlenecks.detail: Car Wash generates passive income. Add Weed Farm ($715K) and Heli Tours ($750K) as feeders to maximize earnings.

bottlenecks.label: 🎭 Nightclub Equipment Upgrade Missing
bottlenecks.detail: Production speed is 50% slower without this upgrade.

bottlenecks.label: 🎭 Nightclub Floors 1/5 (AFK Limited)
bottlenecks.detail: AFK limited to 20 hours. With 5 floors: 66 hours (overnight safe).

bottlenecks.label: 🚚 Need Pounder Custom for Large Sales
bottlenecks.solution: Buy Pounder Custom ($1.9M) from Warstock. DO NOT buy Mule Custom.
bottlenecks.detail: Essential for selling 90+ crates. The Mule is slow and buggy - skip it entirely.
